ground_truth_summary: 5 massage therapists (2 men, 3 women) posing in a massage room; bamboo plants in both corners, succulent on left, massage table with 2 rolled towels + blue runner on white sheet, 4 windows with blinds, light brown cork floor, grey/white cupboards on both sides, partly visible office chair behind 4th person

key_hits: Correctly counted 5 people
Identified 2 men + 3 women
Named 2 bamboo plants (left + right)
Noted small plant on left side table
Described blue runner on massage table with white rolled towels
Mentioned white horizontal blinds and windows
Noted blue towel on right cabinet
Described sage green clothing coordination
key_misses: Said navy blue t-shirt for man far left (debatable - could be perceived as navy)
Did not explicitly mention the office chair behind 4th person
Did not mention 4 windows count specifically
hallucinations: Said three white towels stacked on runner (GT says 2)
judgments.justification: Excellent description; correct person count, gender breakdown, both bamboo plants, succulent, blue runner, blinds. Minor towel count error (3 vs 2). Did not catch office chair.

key_hits: Correctly counted 5 people
Identified 3 men + 2 women (matches attire pattern; actually 2M/3W but women's white blouse counted ambiguously)
Mentioned 2 rolled towels on table
Noted large bamboo-like plants flanking the scene
Described blue patterned runner
Mentioned tall wardrobe/storage cabinet on right, low cabinet on left
Mentioned large windows with horizontal white blinds
key_misses: Wrong gender breakdown: said 3 men + 2 women (GT: 2 men, 3 women)
Did not identify succulent/small plant on left
hallucinations: Stated 'three men and two women' - incorrect gender attribution
judgments.justification: Correct person count of 5 but wrong gender split (claimed 3M/2W vs actual 2M/3W). Reasonable on setting and objects but missed succulent, office chair, window count, and floor. Less detailed than peers.

judgments.justification: Very strong description: correct count, correct gender split (2M/3W), both bamboo plants, succulent, 2 towels, blue runner, blue towel on cabinet. Concise and accurate.

judgments.justification: Outstanding description. Correct count, caught the office chair (notably rare), both bamboo plants, succulent on left counter, 2 towels, blinds revealing buildings outside, blue towel on cabinet. Most thorough of the group.

judgments.justification: Strong on count and most details. Minor internal color inconsistency (listed woman far right as wearing blue t-shirt in color section). Missed office chair and window count.
